form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months crossed from a wide gate to settle just off the pace but gave ground when 6th of 12 at this track on March 25 over 1600m, 10 len behind Vulture Star carrying 56kg at $7.70. Previously second-up 3rd of 14 at Tokyo Dirt on May 18 over 2100m, 5.5 len behind Yuino Lecter with 57.0kg at $9.50. Fitter again and a winning hope.
